response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for 'caramel ribbon cursetard'. The video contains the full song and a subsequent talk segment with Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis. I have transcribed the song lyrics fully, including those not in the initial reference JSON, and provided a complete transcription of the English talk segment. Timestamps are strictly wrapped to the vocal audio, and on-screen credits are transcribed at the start.

subtitles.original:
caramel ribbon cursetard
Lyrics: meg rock Music: ミト (mito)
subtitles.english:
caramel ribbon cursetard
Lyrics: meg rock Music: mito

subtitles.original: ああしたい？ こうしたい？ どうしたい？
subtitles.english: Want this? Want that? What do you want?

subtitles.original: まるで死んでるみたい
subtitles.english: It's almost like I'm dead

subtitles.original: 石の上にも残念！
subtitles.english: Three years on a stone, such a pity!

subtitles.original: でもそんなんじゃ
subtitles.english: But that's not enough

subtitles.original: エーアイサーキュレーション
subtitles.english: AI Circulation

subtitles.original: 今日やっと始まっちゃうストーリー
subtitles.english: The story that finally starts today

subtitles.original: 一等星の手のひらのようなイモーション
subtitles.english: An emotion like the palm of a first-magnitude star

subtitles.original: 空から飛び出し いい気味だなんて
subtitles.english: Jumping out from the sky, thinking 'serves you right'

subtitles.original: 君は決め顔で せーの
subtitles.english: With your signature look, one, two...

subtitles.original: 永遠の亡骸だった夢に
subtitles.english: In the dream that was an eternal corpse

subtitles.original: 終わりを告げる朝が来た
subtitles.english: Morning has come to signal the end

subtitles.original: 嘘吐きでできたその涙
subtitles.english: Those tears made of lies

subtitles.original: 見つめ 見つめ 見つけた心
subtitles.english: Staring, staring, I found a heart

subtitles.original: 甘く ほろ苦い キャラメルのように
subtitles.english: Sweet and bittersweet, just like caramel

subtitles.original: 絡まるリボンは 呪いの鎧だけど
subtitles.english: The tangled ribbon is an armor of curses, but...

subtitles.original: この気持ちはそう この気持ちにしか
subtitles.english: This feeling is, yes, only to this feeling...

subtitles.original: きっと分かんないから
subtitles.english: Surely it can't be understood

subtitles.original: 君と手と手つないで
subtitles.english: Hand in hand with you

subtitles.original: ひとつひとつ叶えてゆこう
subtitles.english: Let's make them come true one by one

subtitles.original: 僕らの物語は
subtitles.english: Our story

subtitles.original: 今日も続く 約束
subtitles.english: Continues today, it's a promise

subtitles.original: 彩りどりの 真っ黒な歴史
subtitles.english: Colorful, pitch-black history

subtitles.original: 愛おしい 僕らの歴史
subtitles.english: Our precious history

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない 真っ白なページ
subtitles.english: A pure white page that no one knows

subtitles.original: 更新してゆく
subtitles.english: We keep updating

subtitles.original: 離したくない ほころびは
subtitles.english: The flaws I don't want to let go of

subtitles.original: 離したくない 喜びで
subtitles.english: With the joy I don't want to let go of

subtitles.original: 継ぎ接ぎだらけの この心
subtitles.english: This heart full of patches

subtitles.original: 噤み 紡ぎ つないだところ
subtitles.english: Hushed, spun, and connected

subtitles.original: 憧れ 恋い焦がれ 自己愛 全部 全部 全部 全部！
subtitles.english: Adoration, yearning, self-love, all, all, all, all!

subtitles.original: プリンみたいに ひっくり返して キャラメル キャラメル マイオフェイバリット
subtitles.english: Flip it over like a pudding, caramel, caramel, my favorite

subtitles.original: Yay!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: It was pretty fun.
subtitles.english: It was pretty fun.

subtitles.original:
Yeah, yeah, yeah! We did a really cute one, Ina!

subtitles.english:

subtitles.original: Our "caramel ribbon cursetard"!
subtitles.english: Our "caramel ribbon cursetard"!

subtitles.original:
Yeah, you guys's voices... you guys's?

subtitles.english: Yeah, it's a really cute song.

Me and Ina were like,
"What song should we do together?"
subtitles.english:

and I was like, "Ah, I wonder if Ina would

and I was like, "Ah, I wonder if Ina would

and she's like, "Yes!"

and she's like, "Yes!"

of course I'm gonna say yes!

of course I'm gonna say yes!
